overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating a dystopian urban environment with heavy orange atmospheric haze. The player crosses a street, enters a brutalist building, traverses neon-lit corridors and stairwells, and explores an upper-level commercial area before emerging onto a trash-strewn exterior ledge.

events.description: crossing the street at the yellow striped crosswalk
approaching the entrance of the large brutalist building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the crosswalk toward the building entrance through the orange haze

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: tall concrete building with vertical windows and neon signage at the top
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
horizontal traffic signal extending over the street
large colorful advertisement display showing animated graphics
dark colored car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a hazy orange-lit city street with a large brutalist tower dominating the view. The player crosses a striped crosswalk while a car passes by on the right, approaching the entrance of the building through the thick atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance corridor with neon accents

events.description: entering dimly lit interior space with prominent cyan neon doorways
slight turn to the right while proceeding through the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the building entrance into a narrow corridor illuminated by cyan neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking ahead into the building

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the building's interior entrance
doorway framed with bright cyan neon light strips
tall vertical windows looking out to the hazy exterior

segments.scene_description: The player enters the building, transitioning from the hazy exterior to a dimly lit corridor with cyan neon doorways on the left. The space is narrow with tall windows on the right showing the orange haze outside, and other pedestrians are visible ahead.

events.description: passing holographic billboard advertisements mounted on the left wall

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the corridor past various advertisements and approaching a stairwell

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement display featuring text and graphics
opening leading to stairs going upward

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the enclosed corridor, the player passes holographic billboards on the left wall while the right side features tall windows. The corridor leads toward a visible stairwell entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: arched upper level concourse with vending machines

events.description: ascending stairs to the upper level concourse
entering the arched commercial area with vending machines and signage

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and entering an upper level concourse with arched ceilings and commercial fixtures

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the top of the stairs observing the area

entered.detail: curved concrete ceiling structure spanning the corridor
bright red rectangular vending unit with illuminated display
purple commercial vending booth with signage
tall sign with multiple directional arrows and text

segments.scene_description: The player ascends stairs into an upper-level concourse characterized by arched concrete ceilings. The area features colorful vending machines and directional signage, with other pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial upper level transitioning to exterior ledge

events.description: passing the neon-lit Flesh Delights storefront with bright signage
exiting through doorway to exterior ledge with city overlook

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial establishments and emerging onto an exterior ledge with trash piles

entered.detail: commercial establishment with bright neon green and red signage
large advertisement showing a face with text overlay
safety railing along the exterior walkway overlooking the city
large container overflowing with garbage bags
scattered garbage and debris accumulated on the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player navigates through a commercial area featuring a prominent neon-lit storefront, then transitions to an exterior ledge with metal railings. The ledge is littered with trash piles and dumpsters, offering a view of the hazy city below.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior ledge and return to interior corridor

events.description: navigating around accumulated trash piles on the exterior walkway
re-entering the interior corridor from the exterior ledge

agents.ego_description: exploring the trash-strewn exterior ledge before turning back into the interior corridor

entered.detail: doorway leading back into the covered interior space
wooden bench along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the exterior ledge, navigating past trash piles and directional signs, then turns to re-enter the interior corridor. The final area shows a return to the arched interior space with vending booths and distant pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy, orange-lit city street into the depths of a brutalist tower and back again. It begins by crossing a striped crosswalk toward a dominating concrete structure, transitioning from the thick atmospheric haze of the exterior into a dimly lit interior corridor lined with cyan neon doorways and holographic billboards. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts from these narrow hallways to an ascending stairwell that opens into a wide upper-level concourse featuring arched concrete ceilings and colorful vending machines. The path then leads through a neon-lit commercial area and out onto a trash-strewn exterior ledge overlooking the smoggy city before finally turning back inside to return to the arched interior space.
